description: Photosnap is a platform built for photography professionals and enthusiasts. We help over 2 million photographers share, sell, and license their work online. We are looking for a Senior Frontend Developer to lead our web team in building fast, accessible, and visually stunning experiences.
requirements: You have 5+ years of professional frontend experience. You are extremely familiar with modern JavaScript (ES6+). You have hands-on experience with performance optimization, accessibility (WCAG 2.1), and cross-browser compatibility. Experience leading or mentoring other developers is a strong plus.
responsibilities: Lead the architecture of our main web application
Mentor junior and mid-level developers through code reviews
Work closely with designers to implement pixel-perfect, responsive UIs
Own performance benchmarks and Core Web Vitals improvements
Establish and enforce coding standards across the team

description: Manage is a project management SaaS trusted by teams at Google, Spotify, and Airbnb. We are scaling from 10k to 100k customers and need a Fullstack Developer to help build the next generation of our platform. You will work across a React frontend and a Python-based API.
requirements: 3+ years of experience building production web applications. Strong proficiency in Python (FastAPI or Django) and React. Comfortable working asynchronously in a fully remote team across multiple time zones. Self-directed with excellent written communication.
responsibilities: Design and build REST APIs with Python and FastAPI
Develop reusable, accessible React components for the dashboard
Collaborate with product managers on feature definition and scoping
Write integration and unit tests with high coverage
Participate in async architecture discussions and RFC processes

description: Account is a fintech startup helping small businesses manage their finances effortlessly. We are building the tools that replace spreadsheets for 50,000+ business owners. Looking for a Junior Frontend Developer eager to grow fast in a tight-knit, supportive team.
requirements: 1+ year of experience or a strong portfolio of React and JavaScript projects. Familiarity with Sass or CSS preprocessors. A keen eye for design and attention to detail. You are a fast learner who actively seeks feedback.
responsibilities: Implement UI components from Figma designs with precision
Write clean, maintainable JavaScript and React code
Fix bugs and improve quality of existing features
Participate in agile ceremonies: standups, sprint planning, and retrospectives
Improve your skills through guided code reviews from senior engineers

description: MyHome is a real estate platform connecting homebuyers with their dream properties across the United States, serving over 500k monthly users. We need a contract Junior Frontend Developer to revamp our property listing pages and dramatically improve the mobile experience.
requirements: Solid, working knowledge of CSS (Flexbox, Grid) and vanilla JavaScript. No specific framework required — we value developers who understand the fundamentals deeply. Experience building fully responsive, mobile-first layouts is essential.
responsibilities: Rebuild property listing pages for a mobile-first user experience
Improve Lighthouse scores and overall page load performance
Maintain and update multiple landing page templates
Collaborate with the backend team to integrate listing data APIs
Deliver high-quality work within a focused 3-month contract period

description: Loop Studios creates immersive digital experiences for top entertainment brands worldwide. Our clients include major streaming platforms, gaming publishers, and music labels. We need a Midweight Software Engineer who can move fluidly across JavaScript frontends and Ruby backends.
requirements: 3+ years of professional software engineering experience. Proficiency in modern JavaScript and Ruby on Rails. Experience working in a digital agency environment with multiple simultaneous projects. Strong communication skills to work directly with client stakeholders.
responsibilities: Develop full-stack features for client projects from brief to launch
Build responsive, animated UIs with JavaScript and Sass
Integrate third-party APIs, CMS platforms, and data streams
Maintain clear technical documentation for each engagement
Work across multiple client projects in an agile, fast-paced environment

description: FaceIt is Europe's largest competitive gaming platform, hosting millions of matches every day for players across 100+ countries. Join our London engineering team as a Junior Backend Developer and help build the reliable, high-scale services that power our platform.
requirements: Basic knowledge of Ruby and Ruby on Rails. Familiarity with relational databases such as PostgreSQL. Passion for gaming and an understanding of what reliability and performance mean at scale. UK work authorization required.
responsibilities: Build and maintain backend services for our match-making infrastructure
Write and optimize database queries for high-throughput workloads
Develop internal APIs consumed by our web and mobile frontend teams
Write automated tests to maintain and improve code coverage
Participate in a light on-call rotation (approximately 1 week per quarter)

description: Shortly is a URL shortening and link management platform used by marketers and developers globally to track, manage, and share links. We are looking for a Junior Developer to help build and maintain our marketing site and internal dashboard tools.
requirements: Good understanding of HTML semantics and JavaScript fundamentals. Experience with Sass or a CSS preprocessor. You produce clean, well-structured markup and take pride in accessible, user-friendly interfaces.
responsibilities: Build and update pages on our public marketing website
Maintain and improve our internal analytics dashboard
Translate Figma mockups into responsive HTML/JS/Sass code
Identify and fix UI bugs reported by customer support
Collaborate with backend developers on new feature integrations

description: Insure is a modern insurance comparison and management platform making insurance simple and transparent for everyday Americans. We need a Junior Frontend Developer to help us build clear, trustworthy digital experiences in Vue.js and Sass.
requirements: Familiarity with Vue.js (Vue 3 + Composition API preferred) and JavaScript. Experience with Sass for styling. You care deeply about building interfaces that inspire trust and are accessible to all users.
responsibilities: Build and iterate on Vue.js components across the platform
Style new features using Sass following our design system
Ensure accessibility standards (WCAG) are met for all new UI
Work with QA to identify, reproduce, and fix front-end bugs
Participate in design reviews and provide frontend feasibility input

description: Eyecam Co. is an AI-powered computer vision startup building tools for retail analytics, security, and smart city applications. We need a Midweight Full Stack Engineer to bridge our Django backend and JavaScript-based data visualization frontends.
requirements: 3+ years of full-stack experience. Strong Python skills with Django or DRF. Comfortable building interactive frontends in JavaScript (React or vanilla). Bonus: experience with WebSockets, data streaming, or any computer vision tooling.
responsibilities: Extend and maintain our Django REST API for camera data processing
Build interactive, real-time dashboards in JavaScript
Work with data engineers on pipeline integration and data contracts
Write thorough documentation and technical specs
Own features end-to-end from database schema to deployed UI

description: The Air Filter Company is a direct-to-consumer e-commerce brand selling premium HVAC filters with subscription options across North America. We need a part-time Front-end Dev to improve our React-based storefront, improve conversion rates, and implement new landing page designs.
requirements: Solid React and JavaScript skills. Experience with Sass for styling. Ability to work independently and deliver features with minimal supervision. E-commerce or landing page optimization experience is a plus.
responsibilities: Build and improve product pages and the checkout flow in React
Implement new Sass-based design system components
A/B test landing page variants to improve conversion
Optimize images and assets for fast page loads
Coordinate with the marketing team on campaign landing pages
